posts.text:
Stand for the flag.

Support our troops.

Be a proud American.

No proof of citizenship?

No ID?

No vote.

Pass the SAVE America Act.

It’s always worse than we thought. 

Jack Smith targeted the phone records of EVEN MORE Republican members of Congress.

How far did Jack Smith really go?

foxnews.com/politics/new-nam…

US committee demands Big Tech share comms with EU officials
politico.eu/article/us-congr…

Fairfax County prosecutor called to testify on sanctuary policies after Minter murder

wjla.com/news/local/stephani…

Protect our elections. 

Pass the SAVE America Act.

It’s common sense.

Protecting airports. 

Securing borders.

Ending drug trafficking.

That’s at risk during the Democrats’ DHS shutdown.

Praying for Susie Wiles as she undergoes treatment.

Susie is a fighter, patriot, and strong leader.

God bless her and her family.

Museums. 

Historic sites. 

National parks. 

Visit Ohio!

travelandtourworld.com/news/…

Praying for these service members’ families. 

God bless America.


JD Vance (@JDVance)

Please join me in praying for the six service members who lost their lives in a plane crash over the skies of Iraq. Three were Ohioans serving with the 121st Air Refueling Wing, a unit I was honored to visit as a senator. A grateful nation mourns their loss.





— https://nitter.net/JDVance/status/2032613051229220997#m

The crazy Left's policies:

-Defund law enforcement.

-Sanctuary jurisdictions.

-Abolish ICE.

-No voter ID.

At least 17,864 ICE detainers were ignored last year by Democrat-run sanctuary jurisdictions.

That's 17,864 criminal illegal aliens roaming free on American streets.

Crazy.

Democrats want to spend your tax dollars on:

-A free K-12 education for illegal aliens

-Fraud to Somali daycares

-DEI programs

But they won’t fund the Department of Homeland Security?

The Left’s template: 

Tell a lie. 

Big media reports the lie. 

Big tech amplifies the lie. 

And then if you tell the truth, they call you names. 

It’s a tale as old as time.

Ohio looks forward to welcoming President Trump today!
wlwt.com/article/donald-trum…

Americans have to show an ID for just about anything:

-Driving

-Flying

-Checking into a hotel

-Opening a bank account

-Buying a firearm

Why isn’t voting on that list?

“Buc-ee’s beaver bounds to Mansfield”

Business is booming in Ohio! 

richlandsource.com/2026/03/0…
The first duty of the American government is to protect American citizens.
